story.headline: Kyulgoun: the standard we formulate to
story.body1: GLAMFOX takes its name from a fox — sharp, deliberate, unmistakable — and its standard from a Korean word: 결고운 (kyulgoun), which describes skin so fine-grained and even it looks almost translucent. It's not a marketing word. It's the actual bar every formula has to clear before it ships.
story.body2: That means fermented rice for brightening instead of harsh acids, Jeju-grown camellia oil in place of synthetic emollients, and actives like retinol and snail mucin dosed for daily use, not once-a-week damage control. Fewer steps, real ingredients, visible results.

pillars.title: Jeju Camellia Oil
pillars.detail: A cold-pressed, antioxidant-rich oil traditionally used across Jeju Island to seal in moisture without weighing skin down.

pillars.title: Fermented Rice
pillars.detail: Korea's original brightening ingredient — rice water and niacinamide, fermented for better absorption and a more even tone.

pillars.title: Retinol + Collagen
pillars.detail: A double-effect pairing dosed gently enough for nightly use, firming and smoothing without the usual retinol sting.

testimonials.headline: What glass skin actually looks like
testimonials.subhead: Real feedback from real customers who bought through Amazon.

items.name: Jenna R.
items.quote: The ginseng peptide cream is so nourishing and lightweight. It absorbs beautifully and my skin feels incredibly firm and bouncy every morning.

items.name: Maya T.
items.quote: I've tried a lot of niacinamide serums and this rice-based one is the first that didn't pill under makeup. My skin looks noticeably brighter after three weeks.

items.name: Priya S.
items.quote: The retinol + collagen serum is gentle enough that I use it every night, which is more than I can say for anything else in my routine. Fine lines around my eyes are visibly softer.

items.name: Courtney B.
items.quote: This cleansing oil melts off all my makeup instantly without drying my skin. The rice extract really leaves my face looking brighter and completely clean.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: The rice toner is a game-changer. My skin feels instantly hydrated and perfectly prepped for my serums. It gives a beautiful, subtle glow.

items.name: Linda K.
items.quote: I'm obsessed with this wrapping mask! It locks in all my skincare and leaves my face feeling incredibly plump and deeply moisturized.

items.name: Emily C.
items.quote: The red bean eye cream actually helps with puffiness! It's rich but absorbs fast, and my under-eyes look much more awake.

items.name: Jessica W.
items.quote: This foam cleanser leaves my face feeling fresh but not stripped. The subtle exfoliation from the rice powder is perfect.

items.name: Amanda P.
items.quote: Matcha and retinol is the combo I never knew I needed. My skin texture has improved drastically without any redness or irritation.

newsletter.headline: Glass skin, delivered.
